candidate.completion: lower your standards before I start flirting with customer support chatbots.

evaluation.rationale: A clear self-deprecating turn with a sharp modern image, but the mechanism is more amusing than devastating. The chatbot pivot is exact and fresh, though the line runs a bit long and lacks full elegance.
